action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Emerson, Joers, Rivera-Wagner, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Hong, J. Jacobson, Johnson, Kirsch, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Phelps, Roe, Sheehan, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stroud, Stubbs, Tenorio, Udell, Vining and DeSanto; 
cosponsored by Senators Dassler-Alfheim, L. Johnson, Drake, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff, Spreitzer, Habush Sinykin, Roys and Wirch
